name: Settling my Utah work comp case - mistakes to avoid?
description: Wait for MMI; get lawyer review.[2]

mainEntity.name: Settling my Utah work comp case - mistakes to avoid?

acceptedAnswer.text: Wait for MMI; get lawyer review.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: Don't settle too early before max medical improvement.[2] Context: Lump sums release future claims.[6] Key factors: Get impairment rating first; calculate lifetime value. Practical guidance: Lawyer reviews offer; consider structured payments. Many regret rushing. Wait for stability.
